---
title: "All Releases"
format:
  html:
    output-file: older-releases.html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || identical(x, "")) y else x
}

meta <- tryCatch(
  rmarkdown::yaml_front_matter("IPBES_Data_Vision.qmd"),
  error = function(e) list()
)

concept_doi <- as.character(meta$concept_doi %||% "")
concept_doi_url <- if (!identical(concept_doi, "")) {
  paste0("https://doi.org/", concept_doi)
} else {
  ""
}
```

```{r, results='asis'}
if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
  cat(
    "<p>",
    "<a href=\"index.html\">Vision</a>",
    " | ",
    "<a href=\"older-releases.html\">All Releases</a>",
    " | ",
    "<a href=\"assets/IPBES-Data-Management-Vision-latest.pdf\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\">Latest PDF</a>",
    "</p>",
    sep = ""
  )
}
```

## All Releases

This page lists published versions directly from Zenodo using the concept DOI.

`r if (!identical(concept_doi_url, "")) sprintf("Concept DOI: [%s](%s)", concept_doi, concept_doi_url) else "**Concept DOI missing in frontmatter**"`

```{=html}
<style>
#all-releases table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
}

#all-releases thead th {
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 0.55rem 1rem 0.55rem 0;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #d7dee6;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

#all-releases tbody td {
  padding: 0.6rem 1rem 0.6rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e7ebef;
  vertical-align: top;
}

#all-releases tbody tr:last-child td {
  border-bottom: 0;
}

#all-releases tbody td:nth-child(1),
#all-releases tbody td:nth-child(2),
#all-releases tbody td:nth-child(4),
#all-releases tbody td:nth-child(5) {
  white-space: nowrap;
}
</style>
```

```{r}
release_rows <- NULL
release_error <- NULL
page_size <- 5L

extract_pdf_url <- function(file_entry) {
  if (!is.list(file_entry)) {
    return("")
  }
  links <- file_entry$links
  if (is.list(links)) {
    if (!is.null(links$self) && nzchar(as.character(links$self))) {
      return(as.character(links$self))
    }
    if (!is.null(links$download) && nzchar(as.character(links$download))) {
      return(as.character(links$download))
    }
  }
  ""
}

if (!identical(concept_doi, "")) {
  if (!requireNamespace("httr2", quietly = TRUE)) {
    release_error <- "Package `httr2` is required to query Zenodo at render time."
  } else {
    zenodo_records <- function(query_value) {
      all_hits <- list()
      page <- 1L

      repeat {
        req <- httr2::request("https://zenodo.org/api/records") |>
          httr2::req_url_query(
            q = query_value,
            sort = "mostrecent",
            page = as.character(page),
            size = as.character(page_size),
            all_versions = "true"
          ) |>
          httr2::req_headers(Accept = "application/json")

        resp <- tryCatch(
          httr2::req_perform(req),
          error = function(e) {
            release_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
            NULL
          }
        )
        if (is.null(resp)) {
          return(NULL)
        }

        status <- httr2::resp_status(resp)
        if (status < 200 || status >= 300) {
          body <- tryCatch(
            httr2::resp_body_string(resp),
            error = function(e) ""
          )
          body <- gsub("\\s+", " ", body)
          body <- trimws(body)
          if (nchar(body) > 280) {
            body <- paste0(substr(body, 1, 280), "...")
          }
          release_error <<- sprintf(
            "Zenodo API returned HTTP %s%s",
            status,
            if (nzchar(body)) sprintf(": %s", body) else ""
          )
          return(NULL)
        }

        payload <- tryCatch(
          httr2::resp_body_json(resp, simplifyVector = FALSE),
          error = function(e) {
            release_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
            NULL
          }
        )
        if (is.null(payload)) {
          return(NULL)
        }

        hits <- payload$hits$hits
        if (is.null(hits) || length(hits) == 0) {
          if (page == 1L) {
            return(list())
          }
          break
        }

        all_hits <- c(all_hits, hits)
        if (length(hits) < page_size) {
          break
        }

        page <- page + 1L
      }

      all_hits
    }

    dedupe_records <- function(record_list) {
      if (is.null(record_list) || length(record_list) == 0) {
        return(list())
      }
      keys <- vapply(seq_along(record_list), function(i) {
        rec <- record_list[[i]]
        rec_id <- rec$id
        rec_doi <- rec$doi
        if (!is.null(rec_id) && nzchar(as.character(rec_id))) {
          paste0("id:", as.character(rec_id))
        } else if (!is.null(rec_doi) && nzchar(as.character(rec_doi))) {
          paste0("doi:", as.character(rec_doi))
        } else {
          paste0("idx:", i)
        }
      }, character(1))
      keep <- !duplicated(keys)
      record_list[keep]
    }

    concept_recid <- sub("^.*(?:zenodo\\.|/)([0-9]+)$", "\\1", concept_doi, perl = TRUE)
    records_recid <- list()
    if (grepl("^[0-9]+$", concept_recid)) {
      records_recid <- zenodo_records(sprintf("conceptrecid:%s", concept_recid))
    }
    records_doi <- zenodo_records(sprintf('conceptdoi:"%s"', concept_doi))

    records <- list()
    if (!is.null(records_recid)) {
      records <- c(records, records_recid)
    }
    if (!is.null(records_doi)) {
      records <- c(records, records_doi)
    }
    records <- dedupe_records(records)

    if (is.null(records) || length(records) == 0) {
      if (is.null(release_error) || !nzchar(release_error)) {
        release_error <- "No release records found for this concept DOI."
      }
    } else {
      rows <- lapply(records, function(record) {
        metadata <- record$metadata
        version <- if (!is.null(metadata$version) && nzchar(as.character(metadata$version))) {
          as.character(metadata$version)
        } else {
          "-"
        }
        publication_date <- if (!is.null(metadata$publication_date) && nzchar(as.character(metadata$publication_date))) {
          as.character(metadata$publication_date)
        } else if (!is.null(record$created) && nzchar(as.character(record$created))) {
          substr(as.character(record$created), 1, 10)
        } else {
          "-"
        }
        doi <- if (!is.null(record$doi) && nzchar(as.character(record$doi))) as.character(record$doi) else ""
        doi_cell <- if (nzchar(doi)) sprintf("[%s](https://doi.org/%s)", doi, doi) else "-"
        record_url <- ""
        if (is.list(record$links) && !is.null(record$links$html) && nzchar(as.character(record$links$html))) {
          record_url <- as.character(record$links$html)
        } else if (nzchar(doi)) {
          record_url <- sprintf("https://doi.org/%s", doi)
        }
        files <- if (is.list(record$files)) record$files else list()
        pdf_file <- NULL
        if (length(files) > 0) {
          for (f in files) {
            key <- if (!is.null(f$key)) as.character(f$key) else ""
            if (grepl("\\.pdf$", key, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
              pdf_file <- f
              break
            }
          }
        }
        download_url <- extract_pdf_url(pdf_file)
        if (!nzchar(download_url)) {
          download_url <- record_url
        }
        download_cell <- if (nzchar(download_url)) {
          sprintf("[Download](%s)", download_url)
        } else {
          "-"
        }
        record_cell <- if (nzchar(record_url)) {
          sprintf("[Record](%s)", record_url)
        } else {
          "-"
        }

        data.frame(
          Version = version,
          `Release Date` = publication_date,
          DOI = doi_cell,
          Download = download_cell,
          Record = record_cell,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
          check.names = FALSE
        )
      })

      release_rows <- do.call(rbind, rows)
      if ("Release Date" %in% names(release_rows)) {
        sort_idx <- order(release_rows[["Release Date"]], decreasing = TRUE)
        release_rows <- release_rows[sort_idx, , drop = FALSE]
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```{r, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(release_rows) && nrow(release_rows) > 0) {
  table_format <- if (knitr::is_html_output()) "html" else "pipe"
  print(knitr::kable(release_rows, format = table_format, escape = FALSE))
} else if (!identical(concept_doi_url, "")) {
  cat(sprintf(
    "Could not resolve release history during render (%s). See Zenodo concept page: [%s](%s)",
    ifelse(is.null(release_error), "unknown reason", release_error),
    concept_doi,
    concept_doi_url
  ))
} else {
  cat("Concept DOI missing in frontmatter.")
}
```
